title: ctenopteris khasyana
intro: Ctenopteris khasyana, also known as the Khasya fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids in its leaves. The health benefits of Ctenopteris khasyana include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the dried leaves being used to make tea or added to herbal remedies for various health conditions.
